The '''Swamp Creature Habogad''', also known as the '''Habogad''', was a massive predator native to [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].<ref name="SEMPOGS">''[[Super Empire Strikes Back Official Game Secrets]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
This creature's name is "Dagobah" spelled backwards.<ref name="SEMP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Super Empire Strikes Back Official Game Secrets]]'' {{ID|Swamp Creature Habogad}}
